description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a natural, live-edge style top, showcasing a variety of wood grain patterns and subtle color variations. The tabletop is supported by two robust, black metal legs arranged in an X-shaped configuration, providing both stability and a modern industrial aesthetic. The wood surface appears smooth but retains some organic waviness along the edges, enhancing its rustic appeal. The legs are thick and angular, contrasting sharply with the warm, natural tones of the wood. There are no visible drawers, handles, or additional features, emphasizing a minimalist, functional design. This table would be suitable for communal or dining use in urban parks, outdoor plazas, or modern indoor environments.
description: A rectangular wooden table with a live-edge top and black X-shaped metal legs, blending rustic and industrial styles. The surface is smooth with natural wood grain and wavy edges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wooden tabletop and both black X-shaped metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the table, the live-edge profile, and a single X-shaped leg.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the tabletop and both supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the table's length, live-edge detail, and one X-shaped leg.
